package rulecoverage

func NegativeXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes() string {
    ruleID := "xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times"
    family := "mod"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "The same local XML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
